summary: Tested 2 new features: (1) Admin revision modal for expenses - allows admin to modify items/supplier before sending back to manager, (2) Compte courant module - admin-only module for managing promoter advances with schedule and repayments. Both features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test expense 'Test révision admin' and test current account 'Test Avance Promoteur' - both cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested 2 new features: (1) Admin revision modal for expenses with data-testid attributes: revise-btn-{id}, revise-supplier-input, revise-new-desc, revise-add-item-btn, revise-note-input, submit-revision-btn. (2) Compte courant module (admin-only) with data-testid: tab-current-accounts, new-account-btn, account-name-input, account-amount-input, add-schedule-btn, save-account-btn, repay-btn-{id}, repay-amount-input, save-repay-btn. Both features fully functional.

tests_passed: Admin can click 'Modifier & renvoyer' button on pending expense
Revision modal opens with existing items pre-filled
Supplier input is editable (data-testid='revise-supplier-input')
Can modify existing item description, quantity, price
Total recalculates when items are modified
Can add new article via 'Ajouter un article' section
Can add note to manager (data-testid='revise-note-input')
'Renvoyer à la gérante' button visible (data-testid='submit-revision-btn')
Tab 'Compte courant' visible for admin (data-testid='tab-current-accounts')
Tab NOT visible for manager (Gérante) - admin-only confirmed
'Nouvelle avance' button opens modal (data-testid='new-account-btn')
Can fill name (data-testid='account-name-input') and amount (data-testid='account-amount-input')
Can add schedule entries with date and amount (data-testid='add-schedule-btn')
Account created successfully with 'Enregistrer' button (data-testid='save-account-btn')
Account card shows progress 0%, solde 600 000 F initially
'Enregistrer un remboursement' button opens repayment modal (data-testid='repay-btn-{id}')
Repayment amount pre-filled with next due amount (200000)
After 1st repayment: progress ~33%, solde 400 000 F
After 2nd repayment: progress ~66%, solde 200 000 F
After 3rd repayment: 'Soldé' badge appears, repay button disappears
Details expand to show schedule (all paid) and repayment history
4 KPI cards update correctly (Total avancé, Total remboursé, Solde restant, Retards)
Delete button works for cleanup

fix_applied.description: Added missing TabsTrigger for 'current-accounts' tab. The TabsContent existed but the TabsTrigger was missing, making the tab inaccessible.
fix_applied.code_added: <TabsTrigger value="current-accounts" className="data-[state=active]:bg-emerald-600 data-[state=active]:text-white" data-testid="tab-current-accounts"><Wallet className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Compte courant</TabsTrigger>
